name: What are the best dishes at Vohuman Cafe in Pune? - Facebook
snippet: Vohuman Cafe is a very popular Irani Cafe in Pune, known for its breakfast items like bun maska, chai, cheese toasts & its variety of omelettes.

name: Reviews of Vohuman Cafe, Dhole Patil Road, Pune | Zomato
snippet: Amazing food and tea. Go for it's special tea and you won't get disappointed. We ordered special tea, bub butter and omelette, all the items were very good.
